message.content:
@startuml
actor CenterCoordinator

participant DataFromLegacySystemUI
participant DataFromLegacySystemController
participant ReadLegacyDataFile
participant Company
participant SNSUserStore
participant App
participant VaccinationCenter
participant Arrival
participant Departure
participant vaccinationCentersStore

CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
DataFromLegacySystemController -> App : 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
App --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 4 returns the store
DataFromLegacySystemController -> vaccinationCentersStore : 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinatorId()
vaccinationCentersStore --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 6 returns the vaccination center
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator : 8 request path of the CSV file
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 9 types path
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 10 readFile(path)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 11 readFile(String path)

loop while csv has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 12 validateFile(LegacySNSUserNumber,\nfirstDate,secondDate,thirdDate,fourthDate)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called\nlegacyDataList
end

ReadLegacyDataFile -> SNSUserStore : 14 getSNSUserList()
SNSUserStore -> SNSUserStore : 15 getSNSUserList()
SNSUserStore --> ReadLegacyDataFile : 16 returns list
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 17 returns list
ReadLegacyDataFile -> VaccinationCenter : 18 getVaccineList()
VaccinationCenter --> ReadLegacyDataFile : 19 returns list

loop while legacyDataList has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 20 findPoOfSNSUser(snsUsersList,\nvalues,positionInSNSUserList)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 21 findPosOfVaccine(vaccineList,values,positionInVaccinesList)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 22 checksDuplicates(updatedList,snsUsersList,vaccineList,positionInSnsUserList,positionInVaccinesList,lineOfTheData)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 24 createArrival()
end

ReadLegacyDataFile -> Arrival : 25 createArrival()
Arrival --> ReadLegacyDataFile : 26 returns Arrival
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 28 generics.Arrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 29 createDeparture()
ReadLegacyDataFile -> Departure : 30 createDeparture()
Departure --> ReadLegacyDataFile : 31 returns departure
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 33 generics.Departure.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 34 returns updatedList
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 35 returns updatedList
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator : 36 requests the option to sort
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 37 selects option
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 38 chooseCriteriaToSort(option)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 39 setListOption()

loop while updatedList has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 40 Saves dates to a\nList<LocalDateTime>\ncalled listToSort
end

DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator : 41 requests the order of the sort

note over DataFromLegacySystemUI : {algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "0" - Ascending"}
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 42 selects order
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 43 getAlgorithm()
DataFromLegacySystemController -> App : 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
App --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 45 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 46 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 47 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)

note over DataFromLegacySystemController : algorithmToBeUsed can be InsertionSort or HeapSort, both have methods that\ncan sort in ascending/descending order, here we are just representing\nthe InsertionSort algorithm because HeapSort functions in a similar way.

DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 48 insertionSortAscending()
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 49 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 50 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator : 53 prints sortedList

note over DataFromLegacySystemUI : {algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "1" - Descending"}
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 52 selects order
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 53 getAlgorithm()
DataFromLegacySystemController -> App : 54 getSortingAlgorithm()
App --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 55 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 56 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController : 57 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile : 58 insertionSortDescending()
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController : 59 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI : 60 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator : 61 prints sortedList

@enduml
